title: Epoch Alpha
summary: Claim DRW, use the canonical tiny-swap path, and share the public proof surface.
focus: The first outside Darwin actions should be small, legible, and repeatable.
share_text: I claimed DRW and made a tiny Darwin swap.
goals: Claim 100 DRW from the public faucet.
Use the canonical tiny sell preset for one first swap, then come back for a second tiny swap after 24 hours.
Share the public activity or epoch link and bring one more wallet.

rules.label: Starter claim
rules.detail: Public faucet amount for a first outside Darwin action.

rules.label: First tiny swap bonus
rules.detail: One first outside tiny swap through the canonical pool.

rules.label: Return swap bonus
rules.detail: A second outside tiny swap at least 24 hours after the first.
